scripts.test: rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --outDir .tmp-test src/lib/game/cards/wingspanReskinMap.ts src/lib/game/powers/types.ts src/lib/game/powers/schemaValidator.ts src/lib/game/powers/interpreter.ts src/lib/game/powers/cardPowers.ts src/lib/game/powers/__tests__/powers.test.ts src/lib/game/powers/__tests__/wingspanReskinMap.test.ts && node --test .tmp-test/src/lib/game/powers/__tests__/powers.test.js .tmp-test/src/lib/game/powers/__tests__/wingspanReskinMap.test.js
